requirement_topic.en: Equatorial Guinea Market Access — No Strong National EVSE Standards Body Confirmed
requirement_topic.zh: 赤道几内亚市场准入——未确认强势国家EVSE标准机构
requirement_topic.zht: 赤道幾內亞市場准入——未確認強勢國家EVSE標準機構

summary.en: As of the dataset date, no strong, dedicated national standards body or published EV charger certification scheme has been confirmed for Equatorial Guinea. The country is a small, oil-and-gas-based economy with a nascent EV market and limited public charging deployment. Practical market access therefore depends on the importer, customs documentation, SEGESA or project utility acceptance, site owner specification, lender or EPC requirements, and IEC-based technical evidence rather than a single published EVSE product mark. Spanish-language documentation may be needed for commercial, customs, and installation files.
summary.zh: 截至数据集日期，未确认赤道几内亚存在强势、专门的国家标准机构或已公布的电动汽车充电桩认证制度。该国是以油气为基础的小型经济体，电动汽车市场处于早期阶段，公共充电部署有限。因此，实务市场准入取决于进口商、清关文件、SEGESA或项目电力方验收、场地方规范、贷款方或EPC要求，以及IEC体系技术证据，而不是单一已公布EVSE产品标志。商业、清关和安装文件可能需要西班牙语资料。
summary.zht: 截至數據集日期，未確認赤道幾內亞存在強勢、專門的國家標準機構或已公布的電動汽車充電樁認證制度。該國是以油氣為基礎的小型經濟體，電動汽車市場處於早期階段，公共充電部署有限。因此，實務市場准入取決於進口商、清關文件、SEGESA或項目電力方驗收、場地方規範、貸款方或EPC要求，以及IEC體系技術證據，而不是單一已公布EVSE產品標誌。商業、清關和安裝文件可能需要西班牙語資料。

standards_or_laws: Equatorial Guinea customs and importer documentation requirements
SEGESA utility/project acceptance for grid-connected electrical equipment
IEC 61851, IEC 62196, and IEC 61000 evidence where specified by project owner, EPC, lender, or insurer
Spanish-language commercial and installation documentation where required

summary.en: China-market EV chargers are usually documented with GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930 DC communication, China domestic EMC and electrical reports, and China commercial labels. Those documents may help explain the design but do not create automatic market access in Equatorial Guinea, do not satisfy IEC Type 2 / CCS2 interoperability, and do not replace importer, customs, or SEGESA project requirements.
summary.zh: 中国市场电动汽车充电桩通常配套GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、GB/T 27930直流通信、中国国内EMC和电气报告，以及中国商业标签。这些文件可帮助说明设计，但不能自动形成赤道几内亚市场准入，不能满足IEC Type 2 / CCS2互操作，也不能替代进口商、清关或SEGESA项目要求。
summary.zht: 中國市場電動汽車充電樁通常配套GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、GB/T 27930直流通訊、中國國內EMC和電氣報告，以及中國商業標籤。這些文件可幫助說明設計，但不能自動形成赤道幾內亞市場准入，不能滿足IEC Type 2 / CCS2互操作，也不能替代進口商、清關或SEGESA項目要求。

gap.en: Before quoting or shipping, exporters should confirm the importer of record, HS code, customs broker requirements, Spanish documentation needs, charger configuration, connector standard, 230/400 V electrical rating, SEGESA connection process, site-owner acceptance criteria, warranty/service model, and any lender or EPC IEC test-report requirements. The absence of a mature national EVSE certification scheme should be treated as a verification risk, not as a compliance waiver.
gap.zh: 报价或出货前，出口商应确认登记进口商、HS编码、清关代理要求、西班牙语文件需求、充电桩配置、接口标准、230/400 V电气额定值、SEGESA接入流程、场地方验收标准、保修/服务模式，以及任何贷款方或EPC的IEC测试报告要求。缺乏成熟国家EVSE认证制度应被视为核验风险，而不是合规豁免。
gap.zht: 報價或出貨前，出口商應確認登記進口商、HS編碼、清關代理要求、西班牙語文件需求、充電樁配置、接口標準、230/400 V電氣額定值、SEGESA接入流程、場地方驗收標準、保修/服務模式，以及任何貸款方或EPC的IEC測試報告要求。缺乏成熟國家EVSE認證制度應被視為核驗風險，而不是合規豁免。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional and project-specific — no strong national EVSE certification scheme confirmed; importer, customs, SEGESA, site owner, lender, insurer, and EPC requirements determine the practical mandatory file
mandatory_status.cn: China CCC/GB/T evidence may support technical review but is not automatic Equatorial Guinea market access

source.publisher: World Bank — Equatorial Guinea country overview

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat the lack of a strong national EVSE standards body as permission to ship China GB/T chargers unchanged. Build a project file around importer/customs requirements, SEGESA acceptance, IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 / IEC 61000 evidence, Spanish documentation, and tropical-environment validation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将缺乏强势国家EVSE标准机构理解为可以原样出口中国GB/T充电桩。应围绕进口商/清关要求、SEGESA验收、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 / IEC 61000证据、西班牙语文件和热带环境验证建立项目资料包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將缺乏強勢國家EVSE標準機構理解為可以原樣出口中國GB/T充電樁。應圍繞進口商/清關要求、SEGESA驗收、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 / IEC 61000證據、西班牙語文件和熱帶環境驗證建立項目資料包。
